name: Agentic OS
description: LangGraph-based agentic operating system orchestrating multi-step workflows against Brain2, Hub, and Claude API.

scripts.name: agentic-gui.sh
scripts.description: Manage the Agentic OS desktop stack — install, start, stop, restart, status

scripts.name: setup-branch.sh
scripts.description: Provision a new AgenticOS feature branch with standard structure

scripts.name: diagnose_cloud.py
scripts.description: Diagnose cloud provider connection errors — walks TLS/proxy/DNS layers to find the real cause

scripts.name: diagnose_tools.py
scripts.description: Inspect registered tool availability and connectivity in the AgenticOS tool registry
